model_tasks: system receives a customer request for a loan amount
risk assessment (ra) web service assesses the request
ra web service  approves the loan
ra web service  denies the loan
ra web service  send the request to the approver web service

merged_tasks.model: risk assessment (ra) web service assesses the request

model: ra web service  denies the loan
ra web service  send the request to the approver web service

user_text:
The process begins when the system receives a customer request for a loan amount. Once the request is received, it is assessed by the Risk Assessment (RA) Web service. After the assessment, there are three possible outcomes.

First, if the RA Web service approves the loan, the process moves forward to the next step. Alternatively, if the RA Web service denies the loan, the process also continues to the next step. Lastly, if the RA Web service decides to send the request to the approver web service, this action is taken before proceeding.

Regardless of which of the three outcomes occurs—approval, denial, or forwarding to the approver web service—the process converges at a common point. From this point, the customer receives feedback regarding their loan request. Finally, the process concludes.
output_text:
The process begins when the system receives a customer request for a loan amount. Once the request is received, the Risk Assessment (RA) Web service evaluates the request to assess the risk involved.

After the assessment, the request is reviewed, leading to a decision point where three possible outcomes can occur:

1. If the RA Web service approves the loan, the process moves forward to the next step.
2. If the RA Web service denies the loan, the process also moves forward to the next step.
3. Alternatively, the RA Web service might decide to send the request to an approver web service for further evaluation.

Regardless of which path is taken—whether the loan is approved, denied, or sent to the approver web service—the process converges at a common point. From there, the customer receives feedback regarding their loan request.

Finally, after the customer has been informed of the outcome, the process concludes.
